title: Ecopetrol and LATAM Airlines Colombia Move Towards the Decarbonization of Colombian Aviation by Boosting the Production and Use of Co-Processed Jet A1
content: Ecopetrol and LATAM Airlines Colombia announced the start of a strategic alliance to advance the energy transition of the Colombian aviation sector, which is based on the exchange of knowledge between both companies: Ecopetrol contributing its experience in research, development and production of fuels, and LATAM its trajectory in air operation, piloting and evaluation of sustainable aviation fuels (SAF).
author: Analysts Account
